ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., T5, PEGASUSLARGE, BART, ProphetNet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model, including hyperparameters */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the model for the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sizes" (
  "data_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data size */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data (e.g., 750G, 3800G, 160G) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., R-1, R-2, R-L) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation metric (e.g., ROUGE, BLEU, METEOR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., T5, PEGASUSLARGE, BART, ProphetNet) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model/evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_versions" (
  "evaluation_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation version */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the evaluation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
